name: Secure Gmail
description: Wraps the Gmail MCP server's tools with mcp-hooks ingress security (prompt-injection guard + secret redactor).

gmailMcpCommand.description: Path to the gmail-mcp Python interpreter (e.g. ~/git/puddles/servers/gmail-mcp/.venv/bin/python).

gmailMcpArgs.description: Args passed to gmailMcpCommand to launch the MCP server.

gmailMcpCwd.description: Working directory for the gmail-mcp subprocess (optional).

model.description: Copilot model used by hook LLM checks.

skipTools.description: Tool names to register without ingress hooks.
